system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.7, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Geographic neighbors are in sustained low-SoC stress; r4c5 must prioritize self-preservation while offering minimal emergency support to prevent cascading failures..
